mapper.sql: equipment_asset_id, equipment_id, purchase_date, purchase_amount, purchase_store, purchase_store_contact, purchase_store_postal_code, purchase_store_address, warranty_expiry_date, purchase_quantity, remarks, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_asset SET equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, purchase_amount = #{purchaseAmount}, purchase_store = #{purchaseStore}, purchase_store_contact = #{purchaseStoreContact}, purchase_store_postal_code = #{purchaseStorePostalCode}, purchase_store_address = #{purchaseStoreAddress}, warranty_expiry_date = #{warrantyExpiryDate}, purchase_quantity = #{purchaseQuantity}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE equipment_asset_id = #{equipmentAssetId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM equipment_asset WHERE equipment_asset_id = #{equipmentAssetId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_asset ea WHERE ea.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ea.equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
